Name: M 48 - The Operating Budget of the Council of The City of New York.
Title: RESOLUTION APPROVING THE FISCAL YEAR 2027 OPERATING BUDGET OF THE COUNCIL OF THE CITY OF NEW YORK

History.Description: This Resolution was Approved by Committee

Attachments.Name: Complete Package - Operating Budget of the Council of the City of New York

Text:
RES. NO.  374

In connection herewith, Council Member Linda Lee offered the following resolution:

RESOLUTION APPROVING THE FISCAL YEAR 2027
OPERATING BUDGET OF THE COUNCIL OF
THE CITY OF NEW YORK

Resolved: By the Council of the City of New York, pursuant to the provisions of section 243 of the New York City Charter that the following amounts shall be submitted to the Mayor, for inclusion in the executive budget for the operating budget for the Council of the City of New York.
